Built an AI-powered weather assistant using FastMCP, Claude Desktop, and OpenWeather APIs to provide

-​
Built an AI-powered weather assistant using FastMCP, Claude Desktop, and OpenWeather APIs to provide 
real-time weather, AQI, and forecast-based intelligent responses. 
-​
Designed an MCP tool-based architecture where Claude dynamically analyzes structured external weather 
data using asynchronous Python API communication instead of relying on fixed hardcoded chatbot logic.

Generative AI | Groq API | MERN Stack | REST APIs 
GitHub: https://github.com/Laxmi1214/fashion-ai 
-​
Developed an AI-powered fashion recommendation system using Generative AI and Groq APIs to 
generate personalized suggestions through dynamic data processing and intelligent response generation. 
-​
Built backend workflows for API handling, data processing and validation to improve AI response accuracy and 
generate meaningful outputs from data provided by the user.
